stemHtml: A pilot plans the take-off using a FLEX thrust setting. At the last moment when lining up the pilot decides to use TOGA thrust. What is the effect of using TOGA?

options.a: The use of TOGA is prohibited and the thrust setting as calculated must be used.
options.c: The take-off must be delayed and the thrust and associated speeds recalculated.
options.d: There is no change to performance.
